examples: In contrast, the operations of global financial markets today affect people from Peoria to Penang.
The roar from this Dickensian forge in the port of Penang is part of a greater reverberation across Asia.
The island of Penang has wide roads, a steady stream of graduates from University Science and an efficient power supply.
To my right, I could see the tsunami heading on towards the northeast corner of Penang.
Penang people like to think of their city as a little bit of serendipity.
